raw_consumer_statement:
I am filing a complaint regarding American Express handling of a billing dispute involving a {$320.00} charge from a rental car merchant ( XXXX ). 

This dispute has been ongoing since XX/XX/year> and remains unresolved despite my repeated efforts to provide clear and sufficient documentation. I have contacted American Express multiple times throughout this process, and notably, several representatives I have spoken with acknowledged that, based on the facts presented, this matter should be resolved in my favor. Despite this, the dispute has been closed against me more than once without adequate explanation. 

This dispute stems from a damage claim that I maintain is factually incorrect. The merchant has charged me for damage to a vehicle that I did not reserve, was not assigned, and did not operate. 

The vehicle I booked through XXXX did not match the vehicle that was actually provided to me by the rental company. The damage claim appears to be associated with a different vehicle altogether. I provided American Express with photographic evidence of the actual vehicle I rented, which does not match the vehicle referenced in the damage claim. 

Additionally, I made a good faith effort to resolve this matter directly with the merchant on XX/XX/year> ( upon departure ), and notified them at that time that the damage claim was incorrect due to the vehicle discrepancy. The issue was not resolved, and I was subsequently charged. 

Despite submitting clear documentation supporting my position, including evidence of the vehicle mismatch, American Express closed the dispute in the merchants favor. I was not provided with sufficient explanation of the evidence used to reach this decision, nor was I given documentation demonstrating that I was in possession of the vehicle tied to the damage claim. 

I believe I have met and exceeded my burden of proof in demonstrating that this charge is invalid. At this stage, the burden should be on the merchant to provide clear, verifiable evidence linking me to the damaged vehicle. To my knowledge, no such evidence has been provided. 

I am requesting that American Express : Reopen and reinvestigate this dispute Provide all documentation submitted by the merchant supporting their claim Explain how it was determined that I am responsible for damage to a vehicle that does not match the one I rented Given the length of time this has been ongoing and the inconsistencies in how this matter has been handled, I am seeking a fair and thorough review, along with removal of the {$320.00} charge. 

I appreciate your attention to this matter and look forward to a prompt resolution.
